name: Zimtsterne1
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the almonds in a kitchen towel.
2. Grind the almonds through a mill or buy already ground almonds.
3. Whip egg whites with salt until stiff.
4. Add powdered sugar while still whipping egg whites and also add lemon juice drop by drop while still whipping.
5. Take 4 tbsp from the mixture, cover, and set aside.
6. Add 1 lb of almonds and cinnamon carefully into the egg mixture.
7. Sprinkle remaining almonds on a working surface.
8. Place dough in small portions onto it.
9. Roll out to 1-inch thickness and use Starcutter medium size.
10. Transfer zimtsterne onto a cookie sheet covered with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
11. Brush the zimtsterne with the egg mixture set aside earlier.
12. Bake in preheated oven on the middle shelf for 25 minutes at 325°F.
13. When cutting zimtsterne out of dough, use the space carefully as remaining dough cannot be reused.
14. Roll the dough into small balls and press down with a fork before baking.
15. Remove zimtsterne carefully from paper and let cool on rack.
16. Store in an airtight container.
